docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPINOSO, JOELLE IND/DBA SPINOSO SCARVES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,364.50 FILED BY UNITED PARCEL SERICE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPINOSO, JOELLE IND/DBA SPINOSO SCARVES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED PARCEL SERICE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPINOSO, JOELLE IND/DBA SPINOSO SCARVES $1,364.50 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,434.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SPINOSO, JOELLE IND/DBA SPINOSO SCARVES
